scope.summary: Corroborates the reported pinned-plus-stateless footprint against an independent D-lane V$SESSION observation without recording connection or identity details.
out_of_scope: Pool sizing recommendations beyond the configured local-lab ceiling.
Abrupt-process teardown; this probe closes stdio cleanly and B7b owns SIGTERM/logoff verification.

entry_points.name: oracle_connection_info
entry_points.trace: A real stdio server on an ephemeral read-only Free23 D-lane profile reported connection_strategy=pinned_plus_stateless and a separate stateless_metadata_pool with pool_open_connections=2.

entry_points.name: [profiles.pool] min_idle startup
entry_points.trace: The same profile configured max_size=3 and min_idle=2; an independent SYSTEM V$SESSION observer counted exactly three sessions bearing the synthetic probe tag: one pinned primary plus two stateless pool sessions.

entry_points.name: understatement refusal
entry_points.trace: The D-lane probe asserted reported_total_session_footprint=3 equals observed_tagged_vsession_count=3 and would fail if the reported footprint understated the independently counted tagged sessions.

limitations: This is a local Free23 D-lane lab, not a production or customer target.
The evidence reports the locally observed pool open_count and the tagged-session count at one startup configuration; unrelated database sessions are intentionally excluded.
